Home.description: I develop web and ERP solutions focused on real digital products, process automation, and social impact. The portfolio keeps its minimal essence, now with a more mature, visual, and direct structure.
Home.base: Based in Luanda, in the final year of Computer Engineering at ISPTEC and building digital products with Python, Odoo, and web technologies.

stats.schools: focus areas: ERP, web, and automation

About.title: About me
About.subtitle: Meet Antonewton, a final-year Computer Engineering student and developer focused on software, ERP, automation, and impactful digital products.

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.subtitle: Odoo Developer and final-year Computer Engineering student passionate about technology, innovation, and social transformation
introduction.description: Antonewton Quima is a final-year Computer Engineering student at ISPTEC with solid software development experience and active participation in social impact projects across education, employability, and urban mobility.
introduction.description2: He currently works on Odoo development and customisation using Python, XML, QWeb, JavaScript, PostgreSQL, and REST APIs. He also builds digital products with Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS, combining technology, strategy, and user experience.

toolkit.title: Working stack
toolkit.description: A practical foundation combining ERP, automation, integrations, and web interfaces: Odoo, Python, XML/QWeb, PostgreSQL, REST APIs, Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, monitoring, and infrastructure.

espaes.title: Odoo Developer (Python)
espaes.description: Develops and customises Odoo modules with Python, XML, QWeb, and JavaScript; provides technical and functional user support; converts business requirements into Odoo workflows; supports Helpdesk, approval flows, reporting, internal process automation, and REST API integrations.

anda.title: Odoo Developer (Python)
anda.description: Developed custom Odoo modules with Python, XML, QWeb, and JavaScript, provided functional support to end users, implemented REST API integrations with external platforms, and collaborated on the migration from Odoo v15 to v18.

compllexus.title: Odoo Developer (Python)
compllexus.description: Customised Odoo modules for client-specific needs, creating features, adapting views, configuring access permissions, and supporting process automation with Python, XML, and PostgreSQL across Odoo v15, v16, v17, and v18.

rising.title: Frontend Developer
rising.description: Developed and maintained the platform frontend with Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Shadcn UI, creating responsive, accessible, and optimised interfaces in collaboration with design, product, and backend teams.

illustra.title: Founder
illustra.description: Founded a development studio to transform ideas into real digital products, leading ideation, design, and development of web solutions with Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.

education.title: Bachelor's Degree in Computer Engineering
education.company: Instituto Superior Politécnico de Tecnologias e Ciências (ISPTEC)
education.description: Final-year student with highlights in capstone project, computer networks, programming, and web applications. Participates in university outreach events and study groups, and is an INAGBE scholarship recipient.

Projects.subtitle: Explore my portfolio of projects from 2023 to 2026, including web experiences, interfaces, and evolving products.

Admin.blobTokenMissing: Configure BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN on Vercel before capturing covers.
Admin.adminUnauthorized: Your admin session is not authorized to capture covers.
Admin.invalidProjectUrl: The project link is not a valid public URL.

Admin.firestorePermissionError: Firestore blocked this action. Update the rules to allow your admin email to write to items and projects. If you were capturing a cover, the image may have been uploaded to Blob, but it was not saved to the project.
Admin.linkRequired: Add the project link before capturing the cover.

Contact.title: Get in touch with me
Contact.subtitle: Have a question, idea, or want to work together? Send a message through the form or choose one of the direct channels.

Version.title: Changelog
Version.description: Track the evolution of my portfolio with updates, design decisions, and structural improvements.

four.title: Version 4.0
four.description: A complete portfolio restructure: new home, responsive navigation, internal pages with a shared visual foundation, Firebase states, clearer contact, refined shop, and an updated changelog while preserving the black, mono, minimal aesthetic.

three.title: Version 3.0
three.description: A major update with a new design and improved performance. The portfolio gained a more modern look, faster loading times, and an enhanced user experience.
